name: The Pterodactyl Defense as Black
description: A Black repertoire for the Pterodactyl Defense, drilled one position at a time: every card is a position with exactly one book move to find. Built from 3,000,000 rated games (Lichess database 2026-06, ratings 1600-2200): opponent replies branch by how often they are actually played, covering the most common 90% at each turn, so frequent lines run deep and rare sidelines stay shallow. 2 positions.

fields.prompt: You are Black in the Pterodactyl Defense. What is the book move?
fields.extra: 1. Nf3 **c5** [White plays Nf3 here 3% of the time]

fields.prompt: You are Black in the Pterodactyl Defense. What is the book move?
fields.extra: 1. Nf3 c5 2. c4 **g6** [White plays c4 here 22% of the time]
